name: W-11 parallel-coordinator subagent ships at agents/parallel-coordinator.md with the sonnet model annotation and prompt_id
command: [ -s "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/agents/parallel-coordinator.md" ] && grep -q 'model: sonnet' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/agents/parallel-coordinator.md" && grep -q 'prompt_id: parallel-coordinator' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/agents/parallel-coordinator.md" && echo ok 1>&2
